params.name: text
params.description: Text to display within the link icon component.

params.name: html
params.description: HTML to display within the link icon component. If `html` is provided, the `text` argument will be ignored.

params.name: href
params.description: The value of the link href attribute.

params.name: iconName
params.description: Toolkit icon name to render. You can use any icon from the generated sprite manifest. Defaults to `ChevronLeft` for left icons and `Launch` for right icons.

params.name: iconColor
params.description: Optional icon-only color override. Leave unset to inherit the surrounding link text colour.

params.name: iconPosition
params.description: Icon placement relative to the text. Use `left` or `right`.

params.name: classes
params.description: Classes to add to the root container.

params.name: attributes
params.description: HTML attributes (for example data attributes) to add to the anchor tag.
